collectiondata.overview:
Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

​

Travelxploria brings you the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata, carefully designed for families, honeymoon couples, and leisure travelers looking for a smooth and value packed international holiday. From iconic cityscapes to serene islands, our Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata deliver the perfect balance of sightseeing, relaxation, and cultural discovery.

Why Choose Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Malaysia is one of the most convenient international destinations for travelers from Kolkata. With strong air connectivity via major hubs, reaching Malaysia is easy and time efficient. Indian passport holders can opt for eVisa or visa on arrival options, and Travelxploria provides complete visa assistance to ensure a stress free travel experience. This makes Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata both affordable and hassle free.

Malaysia stands out for its diversity. In one trip, travelers experience modern cities, tropical beaches, misty highlands, and historic towns. From shopping and food trails to nature escapes and cultural landmarks, a Malaysia tour package from Kolkata offers something for every type of traveler.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Group Travelers

Malaysia is extremely family friendly with safe cities, excellent infrastructure, and attractions suitable for all age groups. Honeymooners enjoy beach resorts, sunset cruises, and romantic city stays, while groups appreciate flexible itineraries and value driven planning. Travelxploria customizes Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata for families, couples, and groups with personalized itineraries and reliable on ground support.

Top Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

The most popular option is the 5 to 7 days Malaysia tour package from Kolkata, covering the country’s top highlights. This itinerary typically includes Kuala Lumpur, Langkawi, and Penang. Travelers enjoy city tours, island relaxation, cultural walks, and scenic viewpoints, all without rushing the journey.

For couples, Malaysia honeymoon packages from Kolkata focus on romantic experiences such as beachside stays in Langkawi, sunset cruises, and luxury hotels in Kuala Lumpur. Budget friendly Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata are ideal for value conscious travelers, offering comfortable hotels and must see attractions at competitive prices. Families and groups can choose customized Malaysia itineraries with private transfers, kid friendly activities, and flexible sightseeing.

Must Visit Places Included in Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Kuala Lumpur offers a mix of modern attractions and cultural landmarks. The Malaysia Kuala Lumpur city tour includes the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, shopping districts, and the spiritual Batu Caves. Langkawi is perfect for beach lovers, known for island hopping, cable car rides, and relaxed coastal vibes. Penang attracts culture and food enthusiasts with colonial architecture, street art, and famous local cuisine. Cameron Highlands provides a refreshing escape with tea plantations and cool weather, while Malacca adds depth with its UNESCO listed heritage streets and night markets.

What Is Included in the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Most Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata include return flights, airport transfers, hotel accommodation with daily breakfast, guided sightseeing tours, local transportation, visa assistance, and travel insurance. Honeymoon and family packages may also include special experiences such as cable car tickets, island tours, or private transfers.

Best Time to Visit Malaysia From Kolkata

December to February is ideal for visiting the west coast and cities like Kuala Lumpur and Langkawi, offering pleasant weather for sightseeing and beaches. March to October works well for highlands and cultural destinations, with fewer crowds and good travel deals. Travelers planning during shoulder or off seasons can often secure better prices on Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata.

How to Book the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers transparent pricing, expert travel guidance, and dependable customer support for booking Malaysia holidays from Kolkata. Booking early, choosing flexible travel dates, and traveling during non peak periods help secure the best deals. Ensure your passport has at least six months validity and keep essential documents ready before departure.

Choosing the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata means choosing a journey filled with culture, comfort, and memorable experiences. With Travelxploria, your Malaysia trip is planned with care, value, and complete peace of mind.

packages.package_name: From Merlion to Petronas: Singapore & Malaysia Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Singapore – Night Safari
    Explore the world’s first Night Safari, witnessing exotic nocturnal wildlife.
  • Sentosa Island & City Landmarks
    Visit Sentosa Island, Thian Hock Keng Temple, Merlion, and Singapore Botanic Gardens.
  • Universal Studios Adventure
    Enjoy thrilling rides and immersive experiences at Universal Studios Singapore.
  • Transfer to Genting Highlands
    Travel to Genting Highlands, a mountain resort filled with entertainment.
  • Genting SkyWorlds & Kuala Lumpur
    Have fun at Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park, then head to Kuala Lumpur.
  • Kuala Lumpur Sightseeing
    Explore King’s Palace, Petronas Twin Towers, and the National Monument.
  • Departure
    Fly back home with cherished memories of Singapore & Malaysia.

After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Embark on a seamless exploration of Singapore’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s best-in-class service. Our experienced tour guide and on-ground support staff ensure a hassle-free journey, starting with Sentosa Island, where pristine beaches, luxury resorts, and thrilling attractions await. Next, visit the historic Thian Hock Keng Temple, a masterpiece of Chinese architecture, where our guide shares intriguing tales of Singapore’s rich heritage. Continue to the Merlion, Singapore’s national symbol, offering breathtaking waterfront views, perfect for capturing unforgettable moments. Conclude the day with a peaceful stroll through the UNESCO-listed Singapore Botanic Gardens, home to lush greenery and vibrant orchid displays. With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off service, your experience remains effortless, leaving you free to immerse yourself in the beauty and culture of Singapore.

Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. National Monument","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an awe-inspiring visit to the Petronas Twin Towers with Travelxploria! After a convenient hotel pick-up in a comfortable vehicle, our friendly representative and expert guide will accompany you to Kuala Lumpur’s most iconic landmark. Marvel at the breathtaking skyline from the observation deck on the 86th floor and walk the famous Skybridge, which connects the twin towers. Learn fascinating insights about the tower’s architecture and history as you soak in panoramic city views. Capture stunning photos before we ensure a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, making your experience seamless and unforgettable!​

Step into the grandeur of Istana Negara, the King’s Palace of Malaysia, with Travelxploria! Your journey begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up by our friendly representative, ensuring a smooth ride to this magnificent landmark. Accompanied by our expert guide, marvel at the stunning golden domes and majestic architecture of the official residence of the Malaysian King. Witness the Royal Guard ceremony, capturing iconic photos against the grand palace gates. Our guide will share fascinating insights into Malaysia’s monarchy, culture, and traditions, making your visit an enriching experience. Stroll through the beautifully maintained palace grounds and absorb the regal ambiance. After admiring this symbol of Malaysia’s royal heritage, take a moment to relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and luxurious experience with Travelxploria. A visit to the King’s Palace is truly a royal affair not to be missed!

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

Stroll through the beautifully maintained palace grounds and absorb the regal ambiance. After admiring this symbol of Malaysia’s royal heritage, take a moment to relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and luxurious experience with Travelxploria. A visit to the King’s Palace is truly a royal affair not to be missed!

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

With our experienced tour guide offering a final glimpse into Malaysia’s rich heritage and our best on-ground support staff handling all logistics, your journey to Kuala Lumpur Airport is effortless.

As you board your flight back to Singapore or your next destination, take a moment to reflect on the incredible experiences—from vibrant cityscapes to thrilling adventures and cultural wonders. With memories of iconic landmarks, luxurious experiences, and seamless travel arrangements, your journey with Travelxploria has been nothing short of exceptional. Safe travels, and we look forward to crafting your next unforgettable adventure.

packages.overview:
• Arrival & City Views – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, visit KL Tower Observatory for panoramic views, and explore the Chocolate Boutique.
  • KL Highlights & Genting Excursion – Guided city tour, visit Batu Caves, and enjoy thrilling rides at Skyworld Theme Park in Genting Highlands.
  • Putrajaya & Malacca Exploration – Orientation tour of Putrajaya, drive to Malacca, enjoy a scenic river cruise, and visit the Maritime Museum.
  • Journey to Singapore & Gardens by the Bay – Drive to Singapore, explore the city with a guided tour, and visit the stunning Gardens by the Bay.
  • Bird Park & Sentosa Island Adventure – Visit Mandai Bird Park, enjoy breathtaking views from MBS Sky Park, and take a cable car ride to Sentosa Island.
  • Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium – Experience thrilling rides at Universal Studios and explore marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Board the Genting Dream Cruise – Check out from the hotel and embark on the luxurious Genting Dream Cruise for an exciting sea journey.
  • Cruise Leisure & Entertainment – Enjoy world-class amenities, pools, gourmet dining, and entertainment on board.
  • Cruise Exploration & Relaxation – Continue indulging in the cruise’s activities, fine dining, and vibrant entertainment.
  • Departure – Disembark from the cruise and head to the airport, bidding farewell to an unforgettable journey.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Start your day with an enriching orientation tour of Putrajaya, where our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will introduce you to Malaysia’s administrative capital, famed for its grand architecture, serene lakes, and stunning bridges. Marvel at landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra before setting off on a scenic drive to Malacca, a city steeped in colonial history. Upon arrival, embark on a Malacca River Cruise, gliding past colorful heritage buildings, historic churches, and vibrant street art that tell tales of a bygone era. The journey continues with a visit to the Maritime Museum, where you’ll explore a life-sized replica of a Portuguese ship and learn about Malacca’s rich maritime history. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, sit back, relax, and soak in the cultural wonders of the day before heading to your next adventure.

After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.


Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

packages.overview:
• Kuala Lumpur Arrival & City Exploration – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, explore Putrajaya, enjoy a guided city tour, and visit a Chocolate Boutique.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands Adventure – Visit the iconic Batu Caves, enjoy a scenic drive to Genting Highlands, and experience the thrills of Skyworld Theme Park.
  • Leisure Day or Sunway Lagoon (Optional) – Relax at your own pace or opt for a fun-filled day at Sunway Lagoon with water rides and adventure zones.
  • Kuala Lumpur to Singapore & City Tour – Travel to Singapore, explore landmarks like the Merlion, Marina Bay Sands, and visit the mesmerizing Gardens by the Bay.
  • Mandai Bird Park & Sentosa Island – Discover exotic birds at Mandai Bird Park, enjoy views from MBS Sky Park, and take a scenic cable car ride to Sentosa.
  • Leisure Day or Universal Studios & S.E.A. Aquarium (Optional) – Free day to explore or enjoy thrilling rides at Universal Studios and marine wonders at S.E.A. Aquarium.
  • Departure – Bid farewell to Singapore and head to Changi Airport with unforgettable memories. Safe travels.

Upon arrival in Kuala Lumpur, our Travelxploria representative will warmly greet you, ensuring a seamless transfer to your hotel. Your journey begins with an orientation tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s administrative capital, where stunning architecture, serene lakes, and iconic landmarks like the Putra Mosque and Perdana Putra set the stage for a memorable experience. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, explore Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant cityscape, from the colonial charm of Merdeka Square to the majestic Sultan Abdul Samad Building. Indulge in a delightful stop at the Chocolate Boutique, where you can savor and shop for Malaysia’s finest handmade chocolates. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with smooth pick-ups, drop-offs, and expert insights into the city’s rich history and culture. Get ready to be enchanted by Kuala Lumpur’s unique fusion of tradition and modernity.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Hotel.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Visit Mandai Bird Park - MBS Sky Park (Non-Peak timimgs) - Visit Sentosa Island by one-way cable car","day_summary":"

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

A visit to Marina Bay is incomplete without experiencing the SkyPark Observation Deck, offering stunning views 57 stories above Singapore. Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before our expert Travelxploria guide picks you up from your hotel. At the SkyPark, indulge in a luxurious wine-and-dine experience, enjoy the breathtaking skyline, and shop for exclusive souvenirs while gazing at the world’s largest infinity pool. With our convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, you can relax and soak in the unforgettable sights of Singapore’s iconic Marina Bay.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

Today is yours to enjoy at your own pace, with our Travelxploria representative ensuring seamless arrangements for a stress-free experience. Choose to relax, explore Singapore’s vibrant streets, or indulge in shopping and local delicacies. For thrill-seekers, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide can take you on an unforgettable adventure to Universal Studios Singapore, where exhilarating rides, movie-themed attractions, and live shows await. Feel the rush of the Transformers ride, brave the Jurassic Park Rapids, or meet your favorite animated characters. Alternatively, explore the S.E.A. Aquarium, home to thousands of marine creatures, including majestic manta rays and sharks. Our best on-ground support staff will ensure smooth pick-up, drop-off, and assistance throughout your day, making it effortless whether you choose relaxation or high-energy adventure. No matter your choice, Travelxploria guarantees a seamless and unforgettable experience in Singapore.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Southeast Asian adventure with Travelxploria, beginning in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll marvel at Putrajaya’s modern splendor and the towering Petronas Twin Towers. Ascend to the cool heights of Genting Highlands for entertainment, shopping, and a thrilling cable car ride before diving into a full day of water slides and amusement-packed fun at Sunway Lagoon. Continue your city discoveries with a guided Kuala Lumpur tour, then journey to vibrant Singapore to wander Marina Bay’s waterfront, plunge into blockbuster thrills at Universal Studios, and unwind on Sentosa Island—complete with beaches, iconic attractions, and the mesmerizing Wings of Time show. Cap off your journey with a curated Singapore city tour, board a luxury cruise for days of scenic ocean relaxation and onboard delights, and finally disembark for your seamless transfer to Changi Airport—courtesy of Travelxploria’s meticulous planning and seamless service.

With our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, enjoy a seamless transfer to your hotel, where you can unwind after your journey. Once refreshed, embark on an exciting tour of Putrajaya, Malaysia’s stunning administrative capital, known for its grand architecture and serene landscapes. Later, head to the world-famous Petronas Twin Towers for a breathtaking photo stop, capturing the towering beauty of this architectural marvel. Whether it’s the city’s modern skyline or its cultural charm, our expert team ensures a smooth, hassle-free experience from arrival to exploration. As the evening unfolds, immerse yourself in Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant ambiance before returning to your hotel, setting the perfect tone for the adventures ahead.

Start your day with a seamless pick-up as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide welcome you for a breathtaking journey to Genting Highlands. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as we leave behind the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur, ascending into the cool, misty heights of Malaysia’s premier hill resort. With the best on-ground support staff ensuring a smooth experience, arrive at the base station for an unforgettable Awana Skyway cable car ride, offering panoramic views of the lush rainforest below.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in a world of entertainment—try your luck at the famous casino, explore the indoor theme parks, or indulge in a shopping spree at Genting Premium Outlets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, our team ensures a hassle-free experience, making this highland retreat a perfect blend of thrill and tranquility.

Gear up for an action-packed day as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide ensure a seamless pick-up, taking you to Malaysia’s ultimate theme park—Sunway Lagoon. With the best on-ground support staff handling every detail, you can focus on the fun from the moment you arrive.

Dive into adventure at the Water Park, where exhilarating slides and wave pools promise endless thrills. Experience heart-pounding rides at the Amusement Park, encounter exotic animals at the Wildlife Park, and conquer the spooky zones at Scream Park. For adrenaline junkies, the Extreme Park offers bungee jumping and ATV rides.

Whether you're riding the Vuvuzela, Asia’s largest water ride, or simply floating along the lazy river, Sunway Lagoon guarantees fun for all ages. As the sun sets, our team ensures a smooth drop-off, leaving you with memories of a truly spectacular day.

Start your day with another round of excitement at Sunway Lagoon, where our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide ensure you make the most of this adventure-filled destination. With the best on-ground support staff, you can seamlessly navigate through the park’s thrilling zones—from heart-racing rides at the Extreme Park to close encounters with wildlife at the Wildlife Park.

After an adrenaline-fueled morning, transition into the cultural heartbeat of Kuala Lumpur with a short city tour. Witness the grandeur of Merdeka Square, the beauty of the National Mosque, and the energy of Chinatown. Capture stunning city views with a photo stop at the Petronas Twin Towers, an iconic landmark of Malaysia.

As the day winds down, our team ensures a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of adventure and culture, seamlessly woven together.

Start your day with a captivating half-day city tour, guided by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide, ensuring you experience the best of Singapore with insightful commentary and seamless navigation. Marvel at the architectural brilliance of Marina Bay Sands, stroll through the lush beauty of Gardens by the Bay, and capture the perfect photo at the iconic Merlion—a true symbol of the Lion City.

As the afternoon unfolds, step aboard a scenic cruise, where our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and luxurious experience. Glide along Singapore’s coastline, taking in breathtaking views of the skyline and nearby islands. As the sun sets, the evening is yours to embrace—whether it’s indulging in waterfront dining, exploring vibrant nightlife, or unwinding under the city lights, Travelxploria guarantees a seamless and memorable journey.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Singapore","to":"Singapore Cruise","splitStops":[]}}]},{"day_title":"Singapore City Tour - Cruise","day_summary":"

Set sail on a day of pure relaxation and indulgence as you unwind on a luxurious cruise, with Travelxploria’s representative ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Whether you choose to take a refreshing dip in the on-board pools, savor gourmet delights at world-class restaurants, or enjoy live entertainment, every moment is crafted for your comfort.

With the expertise of our experienced tour guide, explore the many activities offered by the cruise—be it a rejuvenating spa session, a thrilling sports deck challenge, or simply lounging on the sun-kissed deck, taking in the breathtaking ocean views. Our best on-ground support staff is always at your service, ensuring your every need is met with ease. Let the gentle sea breeze and the rhythm of the waves refresh your soul before you return to land, carrying the serenity of the sea with you.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it's time to bid farewell to the incredible journey that took you through the wonders of Malaysia and Singapore. With Travelxploria’s representative ensuring a smooth and stress-free departure, you will be seamlessly transferred to Singapore Changi Airport. Our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff will be there to assist you, making sure every last detail is taken care of, allowing you to focus on cherishing the memories you've made.

From the bustling streets of Kuala Lumpur to the thrills of Genting Highlands, the excitement of Sentosa, and the luxury of your cruise experience, each moment has been carefully curated to give you an unparalleled adventure. As you board your flight home, take a moment to reflect on the breathtaking sights, the cultural experiences, and the joy-filled moments that will stay with you forever. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you on another journey soon.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Southeast Asian voyage with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll delve into the vibrant streets of Chinatown and Little India before capturing iconic shots at Merlion Park. Wander beneath the towering Supertrees and misty Cloud Forest at Gardens by the Bay, then board your luxury cruise for a day of relaxation, gourmet dining, and panoramic ocean vistas. Return to Singapore’s thrills with exclusive access to Universal Studios and a day of adventure on Sentosa Island—exploring the S.E.A. Aquarium, racing through Adventure Cove Waterpark, and witnessing the magical Wings of Time. Cross into Kuala Lumpur to marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, haggle in bustling markets, and explore city landmarks, then ascend to Genting Highlands for scenic cable car rides and theme-park fun. Back in Kuala Lumpur, discover the sacred Batu Caves, sample local flavors at street markets, and experience Bukit Bintang’s nightlife before Travelxploria ensures a seamless airport transfer for your journey home.

Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.

Begin your day with a seamless hotel pick-up by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a stress-free start to your adventure. Accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, step into the futuristic wonder of Gardens by the Bay, where the breathtaking Supertree Grove and misty Cloud Forest Dome transport you to another world. Learn fascinating insights about these ecological marvels as you wander through lush landscapes and vibrant floral displays.

After a mesmerizing morning, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will assist you with a smooth transfer to the cruise terminal. Step aboard your luxury cruise, where relaxation and excitement await. Settle into your cabin, soak in the panoramic ocean views, and enjoy world-class amenities as you set sail. As the city skyline fades into the horizon, indulge in fine dining and entertainment, marking the start of an unforgettable cruise experience.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Singapore","to":"Singapore Cruise","splitStops":[]}}]},{"day_title":"Cruise Leisure Day","day_summary":"

Wake up to the soothing rhythm of the ocean as you enjoy a leisurely morning on your luxury cruise. Our Travelxploria representative ensures that your experience is seamless, while our best on-ground support staff is always available to assist you with anything you need. Spend your day indulging in world-class amenities—take a dip in the pool, rejuvenate with a relaxing spa treatment, or enjoy spectacular live performances. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will help you explore the best entertainment options onboard, ensuring an unforgettable experience. Savor a variety of exquisite dining options, from lavish international buffets to gourmet fine dining, while gazing at the endless blue horizon. Whether you choose to unwind on the deck with a cocktail or immerse yourself in the onboard activities, this day at sea promises pure relaxation and luxury, making every moment truly magical.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Cruise to Singapore – Universal Studios ","day_summary":"

Disembark from the cruise back in Singapore Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

As you ascend, let our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria share fascinating insights about this high-altitude paradise. Upon arrival, take a thrilling ride on the Awana Skyway cable car, offering panoramic vistas of the lush rainforest and mist-covered mountains.

Once at the top, immerse yourself in a world of entertainment—whether you’re trying your luck at the famous casinos, exploring the indoor and outdoor theme parks, or indulging in retail therapy at luxury shopping malls. Our best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience. From thrilling attractions to exquisite dining, Genting Highlands offers a perfect blend of adventure and relaxation, making it a must-visit destination in Malaysia.

packages.overview: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Travelxploria, touching down in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll be whisked to your hotel to unwind before diving into the city’s vibrant street life. Venture up to Genting Highlands for theme-park thrills, boutique shopping, and sweeping mountain vistas, then return to explore Kuala Lumpur’s cultural crown jewels—marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, ascend the sacred Batu Caves, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Next, cross into Singapore by air or road and discover the glittering waterfront of Marina Bay before delving into the city’s heart on a guided tour of Merlion Park, Chinatown, and other iconic landmarks. Cap off your adventure with heart-pounding rides and movie-magic attractions at Universal Studios Singapore, then savor final moments of shopping and relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your seamless departure home.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian escape with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for a leisurely welcome. Dive into island thrills on Sentosa—with round-trip cable car rides and Siloso Beach lounging—before immersing yourself in the region’s botanical wonders at the National Orchid Garden and Gardens by the Bay. Next, fly to idyllic Langkawi for an exclusive Rainforest & Waterfall Explorer tour, followed by a Wildlife Paradise & Island Discovery adventure showcasing mangrove ecosystems and hidden coves. Finally, savor your last moments of tropical relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your smooth departure home.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Wildlife Paradise – Island Discovery","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exciting wildlife adventure with Travelxploria as we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, a paradise for animal lovers! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a hassle-free journey. Led by our expert guide, explore this award-winning park, home to over 150 species of birds and animals from around the world. Feed friendly deer, marvel at vibrant macaws, and interact with adorable rabbits and exotic reptiles. Witness the fascinating walk-in aviary, where tropical birds fly freely around you. Enjoy engaging animal shows and learn about wildlife conservation in this immersive experience. Whether you're visiting with family or exploring solo, this trip promises unforgettable moments with nature. After a fun-filled and interactive visit, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable wildlife experience in Langkawi!

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

packages.overview:
Kuala Lumpur – The Dynamic Capital

  • Marvel at the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, the tallest twin towers in the world.

  • Explore the vibrant shopping districts of Bukit Bintang and Central Market.

  • Visit the sacred Batu Caves, a Hindu pilgrimage site with towering limestone caves.

  • Experience the cultural mix at Merdeka Square, surrounded by colonial-era architecture.

Langkawi – The Jewel of Kedah

  • Relax on Pantai Cenang, one of Malaysia’s most stunning beaches.

  • Take a ride on the Langkawi SkyCab to enjoy breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

  • Explore the Langkawi Geopark, a UNESCO-listed natural wonder.

  • Enjoy duty-free shopping and luxury resorts for the ultimate island escape.

Malacca – A Glimpse into Malaysia’s Colonial Past

  • Walk through the Dutch Square, featuring the famous Christ Church and The Stadthuys.

  • Visit A Famosa, the remains of a 16th-century Portuguese fortress.

  • Explore Jonker Street, famous for its vibrant night market and street food.

  • Learn about Malacca’s rich history at the Baba & Nyonya Heritage Museum.

Kickstart your Kuala Lumpur adventure with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and expert on-ground support. Begin your day at the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, marveling at the breathtaking skyline views. Next, dive into Malaysia’s rich heritage at the National Museum, home to fascinating cultural exhibits. Take a leisurely stroll through the lush KLCC Park, a refreshing green oasis in the city. Later, visit the stunning Batu Caves, a sacred Hindu site with towering limestone formations and colorful temples. Wrap up your day in Bukit Bintang, where you can shop, dine, and experience the city’s energetic nightlife before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Explore Putrajaya & Cyberjaya","day_summary":"


With Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and expert on-ground support, enjoy a hassle-free journey to Putrajaya, Malaysia’s picturesque administrative capital. Marvel at the breathtaking Putra Mosque, an architectural masterpiece with its pink domes and serene lakeside setting. Visit the Millennium Monument, a striking obelisk symbolizing Malaysia’s growth and vision. In the afternoon, head to Cyberjaya, the country’s thriving tech hub, where innovation meets modern city planning. Explore its futuristic landscapes, vibrant tech parks, and serene green spaces before returning to your hotel. Experience the perfect mix of heritage and cutting-edge technology on this insightful day trip!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Malacca: A Journey Through Time & Heritage","day_summary":"


Embark on a seamless day trip to Malacca with Travelxploria’s expert on-ground support, ensuring smooth transfers and a hassle-free experience. Step into history at this UNESCO World Heritage Site, where colonial charm meets vibrant culture. Visit the iconic Christ Church, the red-hued Stadthuys, and the remnants of the A’Famosa Fortress, each narrating tales of Malacca’s rich past. Wander through the historic harbor and admire the blend of European and Asian influences. Immerse yourself in Peranakan culture, exploring its unique traditions and indulging in its exquisite, flavor-packed cuisine, making for an unforgettable cultural and culinary experience.

As the sun sets, experience Johor Bahru’s lively night markets, brimming with local delicacies, unique souvenirs, and a bustling atmosphere. Stroll through the colorful stalls, savoring authentic street food while soaking in the city’s vibrant nightlife. A perfect mix of adventure, culture, and local charm awaits.

Discover Ipoh’s colonial charm with Travelxploria’s seamless transfers and top-tier on-ground support. Stroll through the historic city center, where grand heritage buildings reflect a rich past. Explore the mysterious Kellie’s Castle, an unfinished yet captivating mansion filled with intriguing history. For a refreshing escape, soak in the Lost World of Tambun’s natural hot springs, surrounded by lush greenery. Whether indulging in Ipoh’s famous street food, uncovering cultural gems, or relaxing in nature, this city offers a perfect mix of history, adventure, and tranquility for an unforgettable getaway.

Indulge in Penang’s world-famous cuisine, from flavorful laksa to sizzling char kway teow, a true delight for food lovers. Step into history at the Penang Peranakan Mansion, a grand showcase of Peranakan culture, reflecting a unique blend of Chinese and Malay traditions. With its perfect mix of history, art, and gastronomy, Penang promises an unforgettable and immersive experience.

packages.overview:
• Iconic Landmarks: Marvel at the stunning Petronas Twin Towers and breathtaking Kuala Lumpur Tower views.
  • Royal Grandeur: Admire the majestic King’s Palace, a symbol of Malaysia’s regal heritage.
  • Cultural Gems: Explore the Batu Caves, home to a towering golden Lord Murugan statue and limestone temples.
  • Thrilling Heights: Ride the Genting Highlands Cable Car for panoramic hilltop views and cool weather.
  • Luxurious Entertainment: Experience the glamorous Genting Casino and lively Resort World Genting.
  • Snowy Adventure: Enjoy the frosty fun at Snow World, an indoor winter wonderland in Genting.
  • Historic Marvels: Visit the fascinating Sultan Abdul Samad Building and Merdeka Square.
  • Shopping Paradise: Browse the luxury boutiques at Suria KLCC and local gems at Central Market.
  • Gastronomic Delights: Indulge in Malaysian street food at Changkat Bukit Bintang and Jalan Alor.
  • Wildlife Wonders: Walk through the world’s largest free-flight KL Bird Park.
  • Lush Greenery: Stroll through the serene Perdana Botanical Gardens, a tropical oasis in the city.
  • Sunway Lagoon Thrills: Explore six action-packed zones, from water rides to extreme adventures.
  • Scenic Excursion: Discover the charming UNESCO-listed George Town in Penang.
  • Colonial Heritage: Tour the iconic Blue Mansion, a masterpiece of Straits Chinese architecture.
  • Beach Bliss: Unwind at Pantai Cenang Beach in Langkawi, known for its soft sands and turquoise waters.
  • Sky-High Adventure: Walk the Langkawi Sky Bridge after a thrilling cable car ride.

Start your day with a seamless pick-up from your hotel, as our Travelxploria representative ensures the best on-ground support for a hassle-free sightseeing experience. Explore the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, the world’s tallest twin towers, and take a leisurely walk through the lush City Center Park. Next, visit the towering Kuala Lumpur Tower, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the city. Admire the grandeur of the King’s Palace and indulge in a delightful chocolate experience at Cocoa Boutique. After an enriching day of exploration, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back at your hotel, ensuring a memorable and effortless journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Genting Highlands Excursion","day_summary":"

Begin your adventure with a seamless hotel pick-up, as our Travelxploria representative ensures the best on-ground support for a hassle-free journey to the Genting Highlands. Enjoy a breathtaking cable car ride to the top, where you can take in panoramic views of the misty highlands. Experience the excitement of Casino Resort, or step into the icy wonderland of Snow World. On your return journey, stop at the majestic Batu Caves, home to the towering statue of Lord Murugan and sacred limestone caves. After an enriching day, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sunway Lagoon Adventure: A Day of Thrills & Fun","day_summary":"

Kickstart your day with a seamless hotel pick-up as our Travelxploria representative ensures the best on-ground support for a stress-free transfer to Sunway Lagoon Theme Park. Dive into a world of excitement as you explore its six thrilling zones—splash around in the Water Park, enjoy adrenaline-pumping rides at the Amusement Park, get up close with exotic animals at the Wildlife Park, and challenge yourself at the Extreme Park. For horror lovers, the Scream Park offers spine-chilling fun, while Sunway Lost Lagoon promises a mystical jungle adventure. After an action-packed day, return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay in Kuala Lumpur.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Kuala Lumpur","day_summary":"

After a memorable journey through Malaysia’s vibrant culture and attractions, enjoy a hassle-free hotel check-out as our Travelxploria representative ensures seamless airport transfers with the best on-ground support. Relax in comfort as you're chauffeured to Kuala Lumpur International Airport, reminiscing about the incredible experiences—iconic landmarks, thrilling adventures, and delicious cuisine. Whether it's the bustling streets of Bukit Bintang, the heights of Genting Highlands, or the fun-filled Sunway Lagoon, your Malaysian adventure has been nothing short of extraordinary. As you board your flight, take home unforgettable memories and the promise of another amazing journey.Safe travels!

packages.package_name: Vibrant Malaysia: A Journey of Culture, Adventure & Luxury
packages.overview:
• Iconic Petronas Towers – Stunning twin towers offering breathtaking panoramic city views.
  • Lively Chinatown – Bustling streets filled with vibrant markets, authentic street food, and cultural heritage.
  • Historic Merdeka Square – A grand colonial-era landmark where Malaysia’s independence was declared.
  • Cultural George Town – A UNESCO-listed heritage city with colorful street art and colonial-era architecture.
  • Majestic Blue Mansion – A beautifully preserved 19th-century Peranakan-style mansion rich in history.
  • Scenic Penang Hill – A cool hilltop retreat offering breathtaking island views.
  • Serene Botanical Gardens – Lush green paradise showcasing exotic plants and tropical beauty.
  • Thrilling Escape Park – An adrenaline-pumping adventure park with zip lines, water slides, and obstacle courses.
  • Golden Batu Ferringhi Beach – A pristine beach perfect for relaxation, water sports, and seaside dining.
  • Tropical Langkawi – A breathtaking island paradise with turquoise waters, lush landscapes, and sandy beaches.
  • Relaxing Pantai Cenang – A lively beachfront lined with cafes, bars, and soft golden sands.
  • Mesmerizing Sunset Cruise – A tranquil sailing experience with stunning ocean views and fiery sunset hues.
  • Spectacular Langkawi Sky Bridge – A jaw-dropping curved bridge suspended above lush green valleys.
  • Exhilarating Cable Car Ride – A thrilling ascent offering panoramic views of Langkawi’s islands and sea.
  • Enchanting Kilim Geoforest Park – A stunning mangrove ecosystem with mysterious caves and unique limestone formations.
  • Luxurious Farewell Dinner – A delectable seafood feast with ocean views under a starlit sky.

As the day winds down, indulge in Penang’s world-renowned street food at a lively hawker center, savoring flavors that define Malaysia’s culinary heritage.

Start your Langkawi City Tour with an exhilarating ride on the Langkawi Cable Car, ascending Mount Machinchang to reach the iconic Sky Bridge, where you’ll be treated to breathtaking panoramic views of the island’s lush landscapes and turquoise waters. Next, embark on a scenic boat tour through Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, navigating through serene mangrove forests, stunning limestone caves, and unique rock formations while spotting diverse wildlife. As the day comes to a close, indulge in a memorable farewell dinner by the sea, savoring fresh seafood and local delicacies while watching the waves roll in. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless, hassle-free experience with top-tier ground support throughout the day.

Take some time for last-minute shopping, picking up duty-free souvenirs or handcrafted treasures, or opt for a short sightseeing trip to capture the island’s beauty one last time. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless departure experience with hassle-free transfers to the airport. As you board your flight, reflect on your incredible journey through Malaysia, filled with vibrant culture, fascinating history, and breathtaking natural wonders. Depart with unforgettable memories, knowing that your Malaysian adventure was truly extraordinary. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again!

packages.overview:
• Iconic Petronas Twin Towers – Stunning skyline views from the world-famous twin skyscrapers.
  • Majestic Batu Caves – Towering golden Lord Murugan statue and mystical limestone cave temples.
  • Bustling Central Market – Vibrant cultural hub filled with unique handicrafts and souvenirs.
  • Lively Jalan Alor – A paradise of authentic Malaysian street food and nightlife.
  • Historic Merdeka Square – Symbol of Malaysia’s independence with colonial-era charm.
  • Architectural Sultan Abdul Samad Building – A stunning Moorish-designed landmark with a rich history.
  • Fascinating Islamic Arts Museum – Home to exquisite Islamic artifacts and cultural treasures.
  • Serene KL Bird Park – The world’s largest free-flight aviary with exotic bird species.
  • Lush Perdana Botanical Gardens – A peaceful escape amidst beautiful greenery.
  • Thrilling Genting Highlands – Exciting theme parks, panoramic cable car rides, and luxurious shopping.
  • Magical Kuala Selangor Fireflies – A tranquil boat ride to witness glowing fireflies illuminating the night.
  • UNESCO Heritage Malacca – A charming historic town with colonial landmarks and rich culture.
  • Vibrant George Town – A blend of street art, heritage buildings, and cultural charm.
  • Breathtaking Langkawi Sky Bridge – Panoramic island views from a thrilling cable car ride.
  • Pristine Tanjung Rhu Beach – White sandy shores and crystal-clear waters for ultimate relaxation.
  • Interactive Langkawi Wildlife Park – Up-close encounters with exotic animals and birds.

Begin your day with a visit to the majestic Petronas Twin Towers, where you’ll enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience with the best on-ground support and smooth transfers. Next, head to the famous Batu Caves, a stunning Hindu temple complex nestled within ancient limestone caves, home to the towering golden Lord Murugan statue. Continue to Central Market, a cultural hub filled with vibrant handicrafts, souvenirs, and local artwork. As night falls, immerse yourself in the bustling energy of Jalan Alor, Kuala Lumpur’s most famous street food destination, indulging in authentic Malaysian flavors.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Journey Through Kuala Lumpur’s History","day_summary":"


Start your day with a visit to the historic Merdeka Square, where Malaysia’s independence was declared, making it a landmark of national pride. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience with expert on-ground support and smooth transfers. Admire the majestic Sultan Abdul Samad Building, a stunning masterpiece of Moorish architecture, standing as a symbol of Malaysia’s colonial past. Continue to the Malik Islamic Arts Museum, home to an extensive collection of Islamic art, rare manuscripts, and intricate artifacts, offering a deep dive into Malaysia’s rich cultural heritage. Experience the perfect blend of history, tradition, and architectural grandeur.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"KL Bird Park - Perdana Botanical Gardens - Evening Stroll in Bukit Bintang","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a visit to the KL Bird Park, the world’s largest free-flight aviary, where you can admire a spectacular variety of exotic bird species in a lush, natural habitat. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience with hassle-free transfers and expert guidance. Continue your journey to the Perdana Botanical Gardens, a serene oasis in the heart of Kuala Lumpur, perfect for a relaxing stroll amidst vibrant flora and scenic landscapes. As night falls, head to Bukit Bintang, the city’s lively shopping and entertainment district, where you can indulge in world-class shopping, street performances, and diverse culinary delights.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Malacca Heritage Tour","day_summary":"

Embark on a captivating day trip to the historic city of Malacca, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience with the best on-ground support and hassle-free pick-up and drop-off service. Begin your journey at the iconic A Famosa Fort, one of Asia’s oldest European architectural remnants, offering a glimpse into Malaysia’s colonial past. Continue to St. Paul’s Hill, where breathtaking panoramic views await alongside ancient ruins rich in history. Stroll through the vibrant Jonker Street, renowned for its antique shops, street food, and cultural charm. Soak in the UNESCO-listed city's heritage, creating unforgettable memories before returning to Kuala Lumpur.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Skyline Views & Shopping Delights in Kuala Lumpur","day_summary":"

Start your day with a visit to the Kuala Lumpur Tower (Menara KL), where you’ll enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the city from its observation deck. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience with the best on-ground support and smooth transfers. Next, head to Berjaya Times Square, one of Asia’s largest shopping malls, offering an exciting mix of retail stores, entertainment, and dining options. Conclude your day at the prestigious Suria KLCC Mall, nestled beneath the Petronas Twin Towers, where you can indulge in luxury shopping, fine dining, and a vibrant city atmosphere, creating the perfect Kuala Lumpur experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Penang Discovery: Hilltop Views, Spiritual Wonders & Heritage Streets","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable excursion to Penang, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless journey with the best on-ground support and hassle-free transfers. Begin with a scenic funicular ride to Penang Hill, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the island and beyond. Next, visit the magnificent Kek Lok Si Temple, one of Southeast Asia’s largest Buddhist temples, adorned with intricate architecture and sacred relics. Continue to George Town, a UNESCO-listed heritage city, where you’ll explore its famous street art, colonial-era buildings, and vibrant cultural landmarks. Immerse yourself in Penang’s unique blend of history, art, and tradition before returning with cherished memories.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Island Escape","day_summary":"

Fly to the breathtaking Langkawi Island, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless experience with the best on-ground support and smooth transfers. Begin your adventure with a thrilling cable car ride to the iconic Langkawi Sky Bridge, offering stunning panoramic views of the island’s lush landscapes and turquoise waters. Next, unwind at the pristine Tanjung Rhu Beach, known for its powdery white sand and crystal-clear waters, perfect for relaxation. Conclude your day at the Langkawi Wildlife Park, where you can interact with exotic animals and enjoy unique wildlife encounters before returning with unforgettable island memories.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Langkawi","day_summary":"

Savor your final morning in Langkawi with a delightful breakfast, soaking in the island’s tranquil atmosphere. Enjoy some last-minute shopping for souvenirs or take a short sightseeing trip to capture the island’s beauty one last time. Our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless departure experience with hassle-free transfers to the airport. As you board your flight, reflect on your incredible journey through Malaysia, filled with vibrant culture, rich history, and breathtaking landscapes. Depart with cherished memories, knowing that your Malaysian adventure was nothing short of extraordinary. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again!

packages.package_name: Fully Loaded Singapore and Malaysia Tour
packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian odyssey with Travelxploria: land in vibrant Singapore for leisurely exploration, a heritage-rich city and culture tour complete with a scenic river cruise, the National Museum, Gardens by the Bay, Peranakan immersion, and Chinatown discoveries. Journey by car to historic Malacca for an evening of riverside charm and A Famosa’s storied forts, then drive on to Kuala Lumpur to marvel at Merdeka Square, Batu Caves, and the Petronas Twin Towers. Escape to the cool heights of Cameron Highlands—with tea plantations, strawberry farms, and the mystical Mossy Forest—before crossing to Penang for George Town’s UNESCO heritage, Khoo Kongsi’s ornate clan house, and the colorful bustle of Little India. Finally, fly to idyllic Langkawi for two full days of island adventures—think Sky Bridge thrills or beachside bliss—before Travelxploria ensures your smooth transfer home from Langkawi Airport.

Begin your day with a captivating Melaka River Cruise, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless pick-up and comfortable transfer. Glide along the historic river as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide brings Malacca’s colonial past to life, pointing out beautifully preserved Dutch, Portuguese, and British-era buildings along the way. Feel the vibrant energy of the riverside neighborhoods, filled with colorful murals and bustling cafés.

After the cruise, step back in time with visits to A Famosa, the remains of a 16th-century Portuguese fortress, and St. Paul’s Hill, offering panoramic city views from its ancient church ruins. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and enriching experience, allowing you to soak in Malacca’s rich heritage without a worry. With Travelxploria handling all the details, all you have to do is immerse yourself in the magic of this historic city.

Begin your journey at the lush tea plantations, where rolling green hills stretch as far as the eye can see. Learn about the intricate tea-making process while enjoying a freshly brewed cup with stunning panoramic views.

Next, head to a strawberry farm, where you can handpick fresh, juicy strawberries straight from the vines—a delightful experience for all ages. Continue your adventure into the mystical Mossy Forest, a cloud-kissed wonderland filled with rare flora, moss-covered trees, and fresh, invigorating air.

Throughout the day, our Travelxploria representative ensures seamless pick-up and drop-off, providing comfort and convenience as you soak in the serene beauty of Cameron Highlands.

Bid farewell to the refreshing highlands as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide escort you on a scenic drive from Cameron Highlands to Penang. Sit back and enjoy the changing landscapes—from misty hilltops to the bustling coastal charm of Malaysia’s \"Pearl of the Orient.\"

Upon arrival in Penang, our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth hotel check-in, allowing you to unwind before stepping out to explore the vibrant streets. Take a leisurely evening walk along Gurney Drive, famous for its stunning sea views and lively food scene. Savor local delicacies like Penang Char Kway Teow and Assam Laksa, indulging in the island’s rich culinary heritage.

Whether you choose to relax by the shore or explore the buzzing city streets, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable experience from start to finish.

Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with an immersive Penang city tour, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will take you through the rich heritage of this UNESCO-listed gem. Wander through the charming streets of George Town, where colonial architecture meets vibrant street art. Discover the grandeur of Khoo Kongsi, an intricate Chinese clan house showcasing elaborate carvings and centuries of history. Step into the Pinang Peranakan Mansion, a beautifully restored heritage home that offers a glimpse into the lavish lifestyle of the Peranakan community.

In the afternoon, let our best on-ground support staff seamlessly lead you to Little India, where the air is filled with the aroma of spices and the sounds of Bollywood music. Stroll past colorful shops, indulge in authentic Indian cuisine, and soak in the cultural vibrancy of this lively district. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, your Penang experience is nothing short of extraordinary.

With the guidance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, embark on a journey to explore Langkawi’s stunning coastline, pristine beaches, and crystal-clear waters. Our best on-ground support staff is always at your service, ensuring a hassle-free experience as you soak in the island’s breathtaking beauty. As the sun sets, take a peaceful stroll along the beach or enjoy a delicious seafood dinner by the sea, making your first day in Langkawi truly unforgettable.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi – Free at Leisure","day_summary":"

Wake up to the serene beauty of Langkawi, where a day of adventure or relaxation awaits. Our representative from Travelxploria will be on hand to assist you, ensuring a smooth and personalized experience.

With guidance from our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, set off to explore the island’s natural wonders. Take in the breathtaking views from the Langkawi Sky Bridge, a marvel suspended high above the rainforest, or unwind on the pristine beaches with the soothing sound of waves.

For those seeking more excitement, our best on-ground support staff can arrange an exhilarating island-hopping tour, taking you to hidden coves and stunning lagoons. Alternatively, visit the Langkawi Wildlife Park, where you can interact with exotic animals.

Spend your day at your own pace, whether it’s basking in nature’s beauty or indulging in thrilling activities, all while enjoying the seamless service of Travelxploria.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi – Free at Leisure","day_summary":"

Enjoy another carefree day in Langkawi, where you can explore or simply relax at your leisure. Our representative from Travelxploria will be available to assist you, ensuring a hassle-free experience throughout the day.

For nature lovers, embark on a scenic boat trip to Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, where our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will introduce you to the stunning mangroves, limestone formations, and diverse wildlife of this UNESCO-listed site. Spot eagles soaring above and explore hidden caves, all while soaking in the breathtaking surroundings.

If relaxation is your priority, our best on-ground support staff can arrange a perfect beach day for you—whether it’s lounging on Pantai Cenang with a refreshing drink or indulging in a rejuvenating spa session.

No matter how you choose to spend your day, Travelxploria ensures a seamless, comfortable, and unforgettable experience in Langkawi’s tropical paradise.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, take some time for last-minute shopping at local markets or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Langkawi’s pristine beaches, soaking in the final moments of this tropical paradise.

Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and stress-free transfer to Langkawi Airport. Whether you need assistance with luggage or recommendations for souvenirs, our best on-ground support staff is always ready to help.

With the guidance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, every part of your journey has been thoughtfully curated, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Singapore and Malaysia. As you board your flight, take with you the warmth of this incredible experience and the promise of more adventures to come with Travelxploria! Safe travels.

packages.overview:
• Arrival & Night Safari – Arrive in Singapore, check in, and experience the famous Night Safari.
  • Singapore City Tour & Gardens by the Bay – Explore Merlion Park, Chinatown, Marina Bay Sands, and visit Gardens by the Bay.
  • Universal Studios Adventure – Enjoy a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore with thrilling rides and attractions.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur & City Tour – Travel to Kuala Lumpur and explore Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and Bukit Bintang.
  • Sunway Lagoon Theme Park – Experience water rides, amusement parks, and adventure zones at Sunway Lagoon.
  • Genting Highlands & Batu Caves – Visit the hill resort of Genting Highlands and explore the iconic Batu Caves.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Enjoy a relaxed morning before transferring to the airport for departure.

Upon arrival at Singapore Changi Airport, you’ll be greeted by a local representative and transferred to your hotel. After checking in and Get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Kickstart your Singapore adventure with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle for an exciting half-day city tour. Led by our expert guide, explore the city's top landmarks, including the iconic Merlion Park, the stunning Marina Bay Sands, and the vibrant streets of Little India and Chinatown. Capture breathtaking views at Gardens by the Bay and drive past the historic Padang and Parliament House. Immerse yourself in Singapore’s culture, history, and modern marvels. After an enriching tour, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless experience.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!
