packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore | Safari Tour or Bird Paradise
    Arrive in Singapore and visit either the Safari Tour with a tram ride or Bird Paradise for a wildlife experience.
  • Thrilling Universal Studios Adventure
    Spend a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore, enjoying exciting rides and shows.
  • Sentosa Island Exploration
    Visit Sentosa Island with a cable car ride, Madame Tussauds, S.E.A. Aquarium & the Wings of Time show.
  • Singapore City Tour
    Explore top Singapore landmarks, including Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, and Gardens by the Bay.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur
    Travel from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur and enjoy leisure time in the city.
  • Kuala Lumpur City Highlights
    Discover the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and vibrant local markets.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands
    Visit Batu Caves and take a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands for entertainment and relaxation.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur
    Return to Kuala Lumpur, enjoy last-minute shopping, and depart with wonderful memories.

Arrive in Singapore and get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Or

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the two-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria, beginning in dazzling Singapore where you’ll stroll through Marina Bay’s waterfront and wander the futuristic Gardens by the Bay. Feel the adrenaline rush at Universal Studios before returning to marvel at the Supertree Grove’s nightly light show. After a scenic city tour, board your luxury cruise for a day of laid-back onboard entertainment, then wake up to the sights of Kuala Lumpur—Tour the city’s landmarks, breathe in the cool mountain air at Genting Highlands, and explore the sacred Batu Caves and bustling local markets. Finally, Travelxploria wraps up your adventure with a seamless transfer and heartfelt farewell, leaving you with cherished memories of two vibrant countries.

After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.overview:
• Iconic City Exploration – Visit the stunning KL Tower, lush KL Bird Park, and immersive Aquaria KLCC for an unforgettable urban adventure.
  • Scenic Batu Caves Stop – Marvel at the towering golden Lord Murugan statue and explore the mystical limestone caves.
  • Thrilling Genting Highlands – Enjoy a panoramic 2-way cable car ride, exciting theme parks, and luxurious shopping in a cool hilltop retreat.
  • Magical Kuala Selangor Fireflies – Tranquil boat ride to witness thousands of glowing fireflies along the serene riverbanks.
  • Picturesque Cameron Highlands Drive – A scenic journey through rolling hills, lush tea plantations, and misty mountain landscapes.
  • Tranquil Tea Plantation Tour – Discover the art of tea-making while soaking in breathtaking views of sprawling green hills.
  • Enchanting Butterfly Garden – Walk amidst vibrant butterflies and tropical flora in a serene natural sanctuary.
  • Delightful Strawberry Farms – Pick and savor fresh, juicy strawberries straight from the lush Cameron Highlands farms.
  • Bustling Local Markets – Shop for handmade souvenirs, fresh produce, and regional delicacies in a lively setting.
  • Refreshing Morning Strolls – Enjoy peaceful walks through picturesque gardens and scenic viewpoints before departure.
  • Comfortable Hotel Stays – Experience luxurious accommodations with world-class hospitality throughout your journey.
  • Cultural Immersion – Engage with Malaysia’s rich heritage through temples, local traditions, and vibrant cityscapes.
  • Gastronomic Delights – Savor authentic Malaysian flavors, from street food to fine dining.
  • Seamless Transfers – Travel effortlessly with hassle-free pick-up and drop-off services.
  • Cool Highland Climate – Escape the heat and unwind in Malaysia’s refreshing high-altitude retreats.
  • Adventure & Leisure Blend – A perfect mix of excitement, relaxation, and cultural discovery.
  • Expert-Guided Tours – Personalized assistance from our Travelxploria representative for an enriching experience.
  • Breathtaking Natural Landscapes – From lush rainforests to misty highlands, experience Malaysia’s diverse beauty.

En route, stop at the iconic Batu Caves, where our Travelxploria representative will guide you to witness the towering Lord Murugan statue and the magnificent limestone caves—perfect for photos and cultural exploration. Explore this charming riverside village, known for its rich history and natural beauty. As dusk falls, board a traditional boat for a mesmerizing ride along the riverbanks, witnessing thousands of fireflies illuminating the night like twinkling stars—a truly breathtaking sight. Let the serene atmosphere and gentle river breeze create an unforgettable experience. After this enchanting excursion, enjoy a smooth return to Kuala Lumpur, where you can unwind and reflect on this spectacular natural wonder.

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Heritage Discovery Tour
packages.overview: Discover the best of Singapore and Malaysia with Travelxploria on an unforgettable journey blending modern marvels and rich heritage. Arrive in vibrant Singapore and enjoy a relaxing start, followed by a city tour exploring Chinatown, Little India, and panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer. Marvel at the futuristic beauty of Gardens by the Bay and Marina Bay Sands before flying to Kuala Lumpur and transferring to the historic town of Malacca. Wander through Malacca’s UNESCO-listed landmarks and enjoy a charming river cruise. Continue to Kuala Lumpur to witness the iconic Petronas Twin Towers and the spiritual beauty of Batu Caves. With a perfect mix of sightseeing, cultural immersion, and leisure, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable escape across two incredible countries.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia A Tale of Two Cities and Timeless Traditions
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Transfer to hotel, explore Marina Bay Sands & Merlion Park.
  • City Tour & Singapore Flyer – Visit Chinatown, Little India, Merlion Park & enjoy Singapore Flyer views.
  • Gardens by the Bay & Marina Bay Sands – Explore Gardens by the Bay, National Museum & Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Fly to Kuala Lumpur – Transfer to Malacca – Explore A Famosa, Jonker Street & historic Malacca.
  • Malacca Tour – Visit Sultanate Palace, Cheng Hoon Teng Temple & enjoy a river cruise.
  • Kuala Lumpur Exploration – Visit Petronas Twin Towers, KLCC Park & Bukit Bintang.
  • City Tour & Batu Caves – Explore Merdeka Square, National Mosque & Batu Caves.
  • Cameron Highlands – Visit tea plantations, Mossy Forest & Strawberry Farms.
  • Cameron Highlands Tour – Explore Butterfly Garden, Lavender Garden & Sam Poh Temple.
  • Transfer to Penang – Georgetown Heritage Tour – Discover colonial sites & street art.
  • Penang Sightseeing – Visit Penang Hill, Kek Lok Si Temple & relax at Gurney Drive.
  • Departure – Free time before airport transfer.

Upon arrival in Singapore, our representative from Travelxploria will warmly welcome you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After a hassle-free check-in assisted by our best on-ground support staff, take some time to refresh before heading out to explore the city. Discover the breathtaking skyline from Marina Bay Sands and visit the iconic Merlion Park for picture-perfect moments. With the guidance of our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere of Singapore. In the evening, savor local flavors at a renowned hawker center like Maxwell Food Centre or Chinatown Food Street. Enjoy a seamless and comfortable experience with Travelxploria's expert support, ensuring a perfect start to your adventure. Overnight stay in Singapore.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

After breakfast, check out and board your flight to Kuala Lumpur, where our representative from Travelxploria will be waiting to assist you. Enjoy a seamless transfer to Malacca (about a 2-hour drive) with the help of our best on-ground support staff. Upon arrival, embark on a guided exploration of this UNESCO World Heritage city, rich in history and culture. With insights from our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, visit iconic landmarks such as A Famosa, St. Paul’s Hill, and the Red Square. Wander through the bustling Jonker Street, indulging in local street food and picking up unique souvenirs. As night falls, soak in the enchanting atmosphere of Malacca’s historic charm. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with Travelxploria’s dedicated team, ensuring a smooth and memorable day. Overnight stay in Malacca.

Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with a guided tour led by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, beginning at the Malacca Sultanate Palace, a fascinating replica of the ancient royal residence. Dive into the rich royal history of the region before heading to Cheng Hoon Teng Temple, Malaysia’s oldest Chinese temple, where our guide will share intriguing insights into its spiritual significance. Next, explore the Baba & Nyonya Heritage Museum, where you’ll gain a deeper understanding of Peranakan culture.

Continue your journey to the Stadthuys, an iconic Dutch colonial building, and admire the vibrant Christ Church. As evening approaches, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless experience as you board a Malacca River Cruise. Drift along the river, soaking in picturesque views of illuminated historical buildings and charming bridges. Travelxploria guarantees a hassle-free, enriching experience. Overnight stay in Malacca.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. After a delightful breakfast, our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless transfer as you embark on a scenic drive to Cameron Highlands, a serene hill station known for its cool climate and lush tea plantations. Enjoy a comfortable journey in a private vehicle with insights from our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria.

Upon arrival, visit a renowned tea plantation, where you’ll take a guided tour to learn about the fascinating tea-making process while soaking in breathtaking views of rolling green hills. Explore the enchanting Mossy Forest, a mystical ecosystem shrouded in mist, or visit a Strawberry Farm, where you can handpick fresh strawberries.

As the day winds down, unwind at your cozy hotel, or take a leisurely stroll through Cameron Lavender Garden, admiring vibrant blooms in the cool mountain air. With the best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria, enjoy a hassle-free and enriching experience. Overnight stay in Cameron Highlands.

After a refreshing breakfast, embark on a delightful journey through Cameron Highlands with our representative from Travelxploria, ensuring a seamless experience. Start your day at the Butterfly Garden, where vibrant butterflies flutter around lush greenery. Next, take a scenic stroll through Cameron Lavender Garden, where the sight and aroma of blooming lavender create a picture-perfect setting.

Continue your exploration at the Rose Garden, home to a stunning variety of roses in different hues. After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Penang with seamless transfers arranged by our representative from Travelxploria. Sit back and enjoy the journey as our best on-ground support staff ensures a comfortable ride.

Upon arrival in George Town, the vibrant capital of Penang, get ready to explore its UNESCO World Heritage-listed streets. With our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, stroll through colonial-era buildings, admire striking street art, and immerse yourself in the city's cultural charm. Visit Khoo Kongsi, an elaborate Chinese clan house with intricate architecture, showcasing Penang’s rich history.

As the evening unfolds, take a leisurely walk along Chulia Street, indulging in delicious local street food. Explore the Penang Night Market, buzzing with energy and offering unique souvenirs. End your day with a relaxing overnight stay in Penang, filled with unforgettable memories.

Start your day with a seamless transfer arranged by our representative from Travelxploria, ensuring a hassle-free journey to Penang Hill. With the guidance of our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the island and the stunning cityscape below.

Next, visit the majestic Kek Lok Si Temple, one of Southeast Asia’s largest Buddhist temples, adorned with stunning architecture and spiritual significance. Continue to the Penang Peranakan Mansion, where our guide will immerse you in the rich Peranakan culture, showcasing antique furniture, traditional clothing, and unique customs.

Explore the Penang State Museum, where history comes to life through fascinating exhibits. As the sun sets, head to Gurney Drive, a lively seafront promenade offering an array of local and international cuisines. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and comfortable experience throughout the day. Overnight stay in Penang.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Penang Departure","day_summary":"

Start your day with a leisurely breakfast, taking in the final moments of your incredible journey. Enjoy some free time to shop for souvenirs or explore any last-minute attractions in Georgetown, with recommendations from our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Whether it's a stroll through heritage streets or a quick visit to a local market, make the most of your final hours in Penang.

At the designated time, our representative from Travelxploria and best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless transfer to Penang International Airport. Bid farewell to the vibrant culture, breathtaking landscapes, and unforgettable experiences of Singapore and Malaysia. Leave with cherished memories and the promise of future adventures. Safe travels.

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Twin City Adventure Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Check-in and explore Marina Bay Sands or Gardens by the Bay.
  • Singapore City Tour & Flyer Experience – Visit Merlion Park, Chinatown, Little India & enjoy panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer.
  • Sentosa Island Excursion – Explore S.E.A. Aquarium, Madame Tussauds & relax at Sentosa’s beaches.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur & Leisure – Travel to KL, visit Petronas Twin Towers & enjoy street food at Jalan Alor.
  • Sunway Lagoon Adventure – Thrill-packed day at Sunway Lagoon Theme Park.
  • Genting Highlands Getaway – Explore Chin Swee Temple, Genting SkyWorlds & shopping at Premium Outlets.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Last-minute shopping or sightseeing before your flight home.

Begin your day with a guided city tour, led by a Travelxploria representative, to explore Singapore's iconic landmarks like the Singapore Flyer, the Civic District, and the Padang. After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.​

As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

packages.package_name: Enchanting Kuala Lumpur, Penang and Langkawi Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Kuala Lumpur – Petronas Towers & Batu Caves
    Kickstart your journey with a visit to the iconic Petronas Towers and explore the sacred Batu Caves.
  • Shopping & Sightseeing – Bukit Bintang, Putrajaya & KL Tower
    Shop at Bukit Bintang, admire Putrajaya’s architecture, and enjoy a stunning sunset from KL Tower.
  • Fly to Penang – George Town & Blue Mansion
    Discover George Town’s heritage, vibrant street art, and visit the iconic Blue Mansion.
  • Penang to Langkawi – Beach & Cable Car Ride
    Relax at Pantai Cenang Beach and take the Langkawi Cable Car for breathtaking island views.
  • Island Hopping & Sunset Cruise
    Explore Langkawi’s stunning islands and end the day with a relaxing Sunset Cruise.
  • Departure – Last-minute Shopping & Farewell
    Enjoy free time for shopping or sightseeing before heading to the airport for departure.

Arrive in Kuala Lumpur and Get ready for an awe-inspiring visit to the Petronas Twin Towers with Travelxploria! After a convenient hotel pick-up in a comfortable vehicle, our friendly representative and expert guide will accompany you to Kuala Lumpur’s most iconic landmark. Marvel at the breathtaking skyline from the observation deck on the 86th floor and walk the famous Skybridge, which connects the twin towers. Learn fascinating insights about the tower’s architecture and history as you soak in panoramic city views. Capture stunning photos before we ensure a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, making your experience seamless and unforgettable.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience.

Begin your day with a shopping spree at Bukit Bintang, Kuala Lumpur’s bustling retail and entertainment hub. Let our representative from Travelxploria guide you to the best shopping spots, from luxury malls to hidden street boutiques. After a delightful lunch, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a scenic drive to Putrajaya, Malaysia’s stunning administrative capital. Admire its futuristic architecture, the beautiful Putra Mosque, and serene lake views. As the day winds down, return to Kuala Lumpur for a magical sunset at KL Tower. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure you get priority access to the observation deck, where you can soak in breathtaking 360-degree views of the city bathed in golden hues. A perfect way to end an unforgettable day before heading back to your hotel with seamless drop-off services.

Board your flight to Penang, where our representative from Travelxploria awaits to welcome you with a seamless transfer to your hotel. Begin your journey through George Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria leading you through its vibrant streets, adorned with captivating street art and colonial-era architecture. Wander through the lively Armenian Street, stopping at iconic landmarks like Khoo Kongsi Clan House and Kapitan Keling Mosque, each reflecting the island’s rich multicultural heritage. As the sun sets, step into the enchanting world of the Blue Mansion (Cheong Fatt Tze Mansion), an architectural masterpiece showcasing Straits Chinese elegance. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria ensures a smooth and insightful visit before you’re comfortably dropped off at your hotel, reflecting on the beauty and stories of Penang’s past.

to Langkawi – Relax at Pantai Canang – Take the Langkawi Cable Car ","day_summary":"

Escape to the stunning Cenang Beach with Travelxploria, where golden sands and turquoise waters create the perfect tropical retreat. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your beachside adventure. Guided by our expert travel companion, stroll along the palm-fringed shore, feeling the soft sand beneath your feet. Dive into thrilling water sports, from jet skiing to parasailing, or simply unwind with a cocktail while soaking in the breathtaking sunset. Explore lively beachfront cafes, indulge in local seafood delights, or shop for souvenirs at the nearby markets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Cenang Beach offers the best of both worlds. As the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in fiery hues, we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with memories of a truly magical seaside escape. In the afternoon, take the Langkawi Cable Car to the top of Gunung Mat Cincang for panoramic views of the island. Enjoy the scenic beauty and serenity that Langkawi offers.

Escape to the stunning Cenang Beach with Travelxploria, where golden sands and turquoise waters create the perfect tropical retreat. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your beachside adventure. Guided by our expert travel companion, stroll along the palm-fringed shore, feeling the soft sand beneath your feet. Dive into thrilling water sports, from jet skiing to parasailing, or simply unwind with a cocktail while soaking in the breathtaking sunset. Explore lively beachfront cafes, indulge in local seafood delights, or shop for souvenirs at the nearby markets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Cenang Beach offers the best of both worlds. Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day. Afterward, unwind on a Sunset Cruise, enjoying beautiful views of the coastline as the sun sets over the Andaman Sea. It's a perfect way to relax and take in Langkawi’s natural beauty.

packages.package_name: Discover the Best of Kuala Lumpur and Malacca
packages.overview:
Explore the Best of Kuala Lumpur and Malacca with Travelxploria

Embark on a vibrant journey with Travelxploria as you uncover the diverse charm of Kuala Lumpur and the historic wonders of Malacca. Your adventure begins with a smooth arrival in Kuala Lumpur, where you can check into your hotel and explore the city at your own pace. Then, get ready for an exciting Kuala Lumpur City Tour featuring iconic landmarks like the towering Petronas Twin Towers, the bustling Bukit Bintang shopping district, and the serene Sri Mahamariamman Temple.

Next, venture to Malacca for a day trip filled with rich history and colorful culture. Stroll through the ancient streets to witness the A Famosa fort, experience the lively atmosphere of Jonker Street, and enjoy a tranquil river cruise down the Melaka River. Return to Kuala Lumpur for a dose of nature and relaxation as you visit the lush KL Bird Park, wander through the beautiful Perdana Botanical Gardens, and indulge in a delightful meal at Menara KL, with its panoramic city views.

Before your departure, enjoy some last-minute shopping or sightseeing, making the most of your final moments in this dynamic city. With Travelxploria, your journey through Kuala Lumpur and Malacca will be filled with unforgettable memories and seamless experiences.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Head to Malacca, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, with a comfortable transfer arranged by our representative from Travelxploria. Upon arrival, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a journey through history, starting with the iconic A Famosa Fortress, a remnant of the Portuguese era. Stroll through the vibrant Jonker Street, lined with antique shops, street food stalls, and cultural gems. As the evening sets in, embark on a scenic river cruise along the Malacca River, offering breathtaking views of the city's illuminated heritage sites. End the day with a delightful dinner at a riverside restaurant, where our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Nature and relaxation","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a visit to the KL Bird Park, a sprawling aviary in Lake Gardens, where our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless experience. Walk through this lush paradise with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, who will introduce you to the park’s diverse bird species in their free-flight environment. Next, unwind at the Perdana Botanical Gardens, a green oasis perfect for relaxation and nature walks. In the evening, head to Menara Kuala Lumpur (KL Tower), where our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will assist you in accessing the observation deck for breathtaking city views. End your journey with a luxurious dining experience at the tower’s revolving restaurant, indulging in a delightful meal while admiring Kuala Lumpur’s dazzling skyline.

packages.overview:
•  Arrival in Malacca
    Explore Malacca’s historic sites, including A Famosa, St. Paul's Hill, and Jonker Street.
  • Malacca to Kuala Lumpur
    Visit Dutch Square, Baba & Nyonya Museum, and enjoy views from the Petronas Twin Towers.
  • Kuala Lumpur Exploration
    Tour Batu Caves, National Mosque, Chinatown, and enjoy Bukit Bintang's shopping and dining.
  • Kuala Lumpur to Kuching
    Fly to Kuching, explore the Sarawak Cultural Village, and dine at Kuching Waterfront.
  • Kuching Wildlife & River Cruise
    Visit Bako National Park, cruise the Sarawak River, and see orangutans at Semenggoh.
  • Mulu National Park
    Discover Mulu National Park, Deer Cave, and witness the Bat Exodus.
  • Kuching to Kota Kinabalu
    Fly to Kota Kinabalu, visit Signal Hill, Gaya Street, and enjoy seafood at the waterfront.
  • Kota Kinabalu Marine Park & Museum
    Relax at Tunku Abdul Rahman Marine Park and explore Sabah State Museum.
  • Kinabalu Park & Poring Hot Springs
    Trek Kinabalu Park and relax at Poring Hot Springs.
  • Departure from Kota Kinabalu
    Shop or relax before your flight home.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Bako National Park, Sarawak River, Semenggoh Wildlife","day_summary":"

Start your day with a pick-up from your hotel by a representative of Travelxploria, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free transfer to Bako National Park. Here, an experienced Travelxploria tour guide will lead you through lush rainforest trails, where you'll have the chance to encounter the unique proboscis monkeys and diverse wildlife. After your wildlife adventure, enjoy a scenic river cruise along the Sarawak River, taking in the beauty of the surroundings. Later, head to Semenggoh Wildlife Centre, where you'll have the unforgettable experience of observing orangutans in their natural habitat, all with the guidance of a knowledgeable tour guide. With seamless pick-up and drop-off arrangements, you'll feel fully supported by Travelxploria’s best on-ground staff, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the wonders of nature. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a relaxing evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Kuching - Mulu National Park, Gunung Mulu caves, Deer Cave","day_summary":"

Your adventure begins with a seamless pick-up from your hotel by a representative of Travelxploria, who ensures you’re comfortably transferred to the airport for your flight to Mulu. Upon arrival, an experienced Travelxploria tour guide will lead you on an exploration of Mulu National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Marvel at the impressive Gunung Mulu caves, including the awe-inspiring Deer Cave, where you’ll walk through limestone formations and encounter the world’s largest cave passage. As the day unfolds, you’ll witness the Bat Exodus, an extraordinary natural phenomenon where millions of bats take flight at dusk, creating an unforgettable spectacle. Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff will ensure that your day is stress-free, with smooth transfers and expert guidance, allowing you to immerse yourself fully in the wonders of Mulu. After an incredible day, return to your hotel to relax and reflect on the awe-inspiring experience.

After a morning flight to Kota Kinabalu, your Travelxploria representative will ensure your smooth arrival and transfer to your hotel, where you can enjoy a delicious lunch. With an experienced Travelxploria tour guide by your side, set off for the Signal Hill Observatory for panoramic views of the city, coastline, and surrounding mountains. Explore the historical Atkinson Clock Tower and immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere of Gaya Street, famous for its bustling markets, unique shops, and local charm. Your day ends with a seafood feast at the Kota Kinabalu Waterfront or the Filipino Market, where you can savor fresh catches while enjoying the lively seaside ambiance. Throughout the day, Travelxploria’s on-ground support team is there to ensure seamless transfers and expert guidance, allowing you to fully enjoy this captivating city.

Today, your Travelxploria representative will greet you with a warm welcome and ensure a smooth transfer to the jetty for your exciting trip to Tunku Abdul Rahman Marine Park. With an expert Travelxploria guide, you’ll enjoy a day of relaxation and exploration on Manukan or Sapi Island, where pristine beaches, crystal-clear waters, and vibrant coral reefs await. Whether you’re snorkeling, swimming, or simply basking in the sun, the islands offer the perfect escape. After a delightful island adventure, return to Kota Kinabalu, where you’ll visit the Sabah State Museum to learn about the rich cultural and natural heritage of the region. Your Travelxploria on-ground support team ensures a seamless experience with timely pick-ups, drop-offs, and personalized assistance throughout the day. Enjoy the wonders of the island and the history of Sabah in one unforgettable journey.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Kota Kinabalu - Kinabalu Park, Poring Hot Springs","day_summary":"

Your day begins with a warm welcome from your Travelxploria representative, who will ensure a seamless transfer to Kinabalu Park, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Here, an experienced Travelxploria guide will lead you on a leisurely nature walk, where you can explore lush botanical gardens and admire the breathtaking views of Mount Kinabalu. After a day of discovery, it’s time to unwind at the rejuvenating Poring Hot Springs, where you can relax in the natural thermal baths and enjoy the tranquil surroundings. Whether you choose to indulge in the hot springs or take a canopy walk through the rainforest, the experience will leave you feeling refreshed and connected to nature. Your Travelxploria team will take care of every detail, ensuring smooth pick-ups and drop-offs, so you can focus on making memories in the stunning natural landscapes of Borneo.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

On your final day in Kota Kinabalu, your Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth start to your day, offering you a seamless transfer to the Handicraft Market, where you can pick up unique souvenirs to remember your journey by. If you prefer, take a relaxing stroll through the city to soak in the last of the local atmosphere before your departure. Your experienced Travelxploria guide will be with you to ensure everything goes smoothly, from shopping to the airport transfer. Whether you wish to explore or simply relax, your Travelxploria team will ensure you have a stress-free experience, allowing you to reflect on the unforgettable memories of your Malaysian adventure before heading to the airport. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you back on your next adventure.

packages.package_name: Malaysia Adventure From City Life to Tropical Paradise
packages.overview:
• Arrival & City Exploration – Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, visit the iconic Petronas Twin Towers and explore the KL Bird Park.
  • Cameron Highlands Adventure – Travel to Cameron Highlands, visit Boh Tea Plantation and the scenic Cameron Lavender Garden.
  • Nature & History – Explore the Cameron Highlands Butterfly Farm and learn about the region’s past at the Time Tunnel Museum.
  • Pangkor Laut Island Escape – Arrive at Pangkor Laut Island and enjoy an adventurous jungle trekking experience.
  • Water Activities & Sunset Views – Engage in thrilling water sports, watch a stunning sunset from Sunset View Chalet, and dine at Fisherman’s Cove.
  • Beach & Chinatown – Relax at Coral Beach before heading back to Kuala Lumpur to explore Chinatown’s vibrant markets.
  • Departure – Check out and transfer to the airport, bidding farewell to Malaysia with wonderful memories.

[{"city":"Kuala Lumpur","country":"Malaysia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Malaysia/Kuala Lumpur/1740928029910-1740913840651-pexels-ben-cheung-140183-462671.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Malaysia/Kuala Lumpur/1740928028846-1740913807851-AdobeStock_500048544-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Malaysia/Kuala Lumpur/1740928029131-1740913808005-AdobeStock_779669482-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Malaysia/Kuala Lumpur/1744962155470-AdobeStock_254876500-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Reach Kuala Lumpur - Petronas Twin Towers - KL Bird Park","day_summary":"

Arrive in Kuala Lumpur and get ready for an awe-inspiring visit to the Petronas Twin Towers with Travelxploria! After a convenient hotel pick-up in a comfortable vehicle, our friendly representative and expert guide will accompany you to Kuala Lumpur’s most iconic landmark. Marvel at the breathtaking skyline from the observation deck on the 86th floor and walk the famous Skybridge, which connects the twin towers. Learn fascinating insights about the tower’s architecture and history as you soak in panoramic city views. Capture stunning photos before we ensure a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, making your experience seamless and unforgettable.

Begin your avian adventure as Travelxploria’s friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at KL Bird Park, our expert guide will lead you through the world’s largest free-flight aviary, where thousands of exotic birds roam in lush, natural habitats. Marvel at colorful macaws, majestic hornbills, and playful flamingos as they soar freely around you. Enjoy interactive feeding sessions, witness captivating bird shows, and capture stunning photographs amidst the lush greenery. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse bird species and conservation efforts at the park’s educational exhibits. Whether you’re a nature lover or a photography enthusiast, this experience promises unforgettable moments. After an enchanting day surrounded by chirping melodies and fluttering wings, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and delightful journey with Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: Malaysia Uncovered Explore the Heart of Southeast Asia
packages.overview:
• A Magical Journey Through Langkawi, Penang, and Kuala Lumpur
  • Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria as you explore the best of Malaysia. Your journey begins in the tropical paradise of Langkawi, where you’ll arrive and transfer to your hotel to unwind and relax. Start your exploration with a scenic Langkawi Cable Car ride, offering breathtaking views of the island and a walk along the iconic Sky Bridge.
  • Next, travel to the culturally rich island of Penang. Experience the vibrant charm of George Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and marvel at the grandeur of the Kek Lok Si Temple. Then, take a trip up to Penang Hill for spectacular panoramic views.
  • Fly to Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia’s bustling capital, and explore at leisure. Visit the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, stroll through Merdeka Square, and marvel at the sacred Batu Caves. Your journey continues with a trip to the cool Genting Highlands, where you can enjoy thrilling theme parks, visit ancient temples, and enjoy stunning mountain views.
    Conclude your tour with a smooth airport transfer, filled with memories of an extraordinary journey through Langkawi, Penang, and Kuala Lumpur.

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

COLLECTION Kuala Lumpur.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Kuala Lumpur Half day city tour","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

packages.package_name: Majestic Malaysia A Tour of Iconic Landmarks and Natural Beauty
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Kuala Lumpur – Transfer to hotel and enjoy a leisurely day exploring or relaxing.
  • Half-Day Kuala Lumpur City Tour – Visit iconic landmarks, including Petronas Twin Towers, KL Tower, and National Mosque.
  • Langkawi Island Hopping Tour – Fly to Langkawi, explore Pulau Dayang Bunting, eagle watching, and relax at Beras Basah Beach.
  • Langkawi Oriental Village & Cable Car Tour – Experience the Sky Bridge, Cable Car, 3D Art Gallery, and more.
  • Transfer to Penang – Fly to Penang and spend the evening exploring Georgetown at your leisure.
  • Penang City Explorer – Discover Penang’s cultural heritage, visit Fort Cornwallis, Street Harmony, and Wat Chayamangkalaram.
  • Departure – Check out and transfer to Penang International Airport for your flight home.

After breakfast, head to the airport for your independently booked flight to Langkawi. Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

Embark on an unforgettable Langkawi Oriental Village & Cable Car Tour with Travelxploria, where adventure and breathtaking views await! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a seamless journey. Accompanied by our expert guide, begin your exploration at the Oriental Village, a cultural hub filled with charming shops, scenic ponds, and traditional architecture. Then, experience the thrill of the Langkawi SkyCab, one of the world’s steepest cable cars, ascending to the top of Gunung Mat Cincang. Soak in panoramic views of lush rainforests, cascading waterfalls, and the shimmering Andaman Sea. Step onto the Langkawi Sky Bridge, a marvel of engineering that offers breathtaking aerial perspectives of the island. Capture stunning photos and immerse yourself in the serene beauty of Langkawi. After an exhilarating day of sightseeing and adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable experience!

• Langkawi – Arrival & City Tour
    Arrive, check in, and explore Batik Art Village, Cenang Beach, Underwater World, Kuah Town, and Combo Cable Car.
  • Langkawi – Island Hopping
    Enjoy eagle feeding, swim at Pregnant Maiden Island, and relax at Beras Basah Island.

    Fly to Kuala Lumpur, check in, and visit Chinatown, Sri Mahamariamman Temple, Independence Square, Petronas Towers, and KL Tower.

    Take a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands, visit casinos, and explore Batu Caves.
  • Kuala Lumpur – Departure
    Check out and transfer to the airport.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi: Island Hopping","day_summary":"

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

packages.overview:
• Unforgettable Kuala Lumpur Adventure with Travelxploria
  • Begin your Malaysian adventure with Travelxploria in the vibrant city of Kuala Lumpur. Upon arrival, enjoy a Putrajaya Tour, capturing stunning photos of the city’s modern architecture and serene landscapes before checking into your hotel.
  • Spend the Day at Leisure, exploring Kuala Lumpur at your own pace. Wander through bustling markets, sample local delicacies, or relax in the city’s many parks.
    Next, unleash your inner thrill-seeker at Sunway Lagoon, where you’ll experience six exciting theme parks, offering everything from water rides to adrenaline-pumping roller coasters.
  • Continue your exploration with a Kuala Lumpur City Tour that highlights iconic landmarks like the Petronas Twin Towers and Merdeka Square, followed by a visit to the KL Tower for breathtaking panoramic views of the city.
  • Conclude your journey with a Departure from Kuala Lumpur, filled with cherished memories and a deeper connection to Malaysia’s vibrant culture.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sunway Lagoon with Theme Park Entry","day_summary":"

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.​

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Experience breathtaking views of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria on an unforgettable visit to the iconic KL Tower! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, ascend to the observation deck, where panoramic views of the city skyline stretch as far as the eye can see. Marvel at the stunning contrast of modern skyscrapers and lush greenery below. For thrill-seekers, step onto the Sky Box, a glass-floored platform offering a heart-pounding view from 300 meters above the ground. Learn about the tower’s fascinating architecture and significance as one of the tallest communication towers in the world. Take time to capture postcard-perfect photos and soak in the mesmerizing atmosphere. After a truly elevated experience, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless, comfortable, and memorable journey with Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: Cultural and Scenic Tour of Malaysia
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Kuala Lumpur – Warm welcome at KLIA, seamless transfer to your hotel, and free time to relax or explore.
  • Kuala Lumpur Half-Day City Tour – Discover Kuala Lumpur’s iconic landmarks, from Petronas Twin Towers to Independence Square.
  • Genting Highlands & Batu Caves – Enjoy a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands and visit the majestic Batu Caves.
  • Sunway Lagoon Adventure – Spend an action-packed day exploring thrilling rides and attractions at Sunway Lagoon.
  • Fireflies or Blue Tear Tour – Witness nature’s magical light show with fireflies or experience glowing blue waters on a mesmerizing boat ride.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Check out and transfer to the airport, leaving with unforgettable memories of Malaysia.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience! ​

Spend your morning at leisure, enjoying the comforts of your hotel or exploring at your own pace. In the afternoon, our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for a breathtaking journey to Kuala Selangor. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, you will learn about the region's fascinating natural wonders before boarding a small boat for an unforgettable experience.

Glide along the serene Selangor River through mangrove swamps, where you will witness the mesmerizing glow of fireflies illuminating the trees in perfect harmony, creating a surreal natural light show. Alternatively, opt for the Blue Tears Tour, where a speedboat ride will take you to the waters where the Selangor River meets the Straits of Malacca. Watch in awe as the bioluminescent algae, \"Dinoflagellates,\" light up the water with a glowing blue hue, shimmering like tiny stars.

With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, your comfort and enjoyment are our top priority, ensuring a smooth and magical evening in the heart of nature.

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a seamless transfer to Kuala Lumpur International Airport. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, you’ll receive a warm send-off with any last-minute assistance you may need.

With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a hassle-free journey, board your flight with bags full of souvenirs and a heart filled with cherished memories of your Malaysian adventure. Until we meet again, safe travels.

packages.package_name: Exploring Kuala Lumpur and Penang with Travelxploria
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Kuala Lumpur – Hotel Check-In
    Arrive in Kuala Lumpur, meet our representative, and transfer to your hotel for check-in and relaxation.
  • Kuala Lumpur City Tour
    Explore the city’s iconic landmarks, including the Petronas Twin Towers, King’s Palace, National Monument, and Independence Square.
  • Genting Highlands & Batu Caves Excursion
    Enjoy a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands and visit the sacred Batu Caves en route.
  • Transfer to Penang
    Travel from Kuala Lumpur to Penang via coach and check in at your hotel to relax and explore.
  • Penang City Tour
    Discover Penang’s cultural gems, historic temples, colonial sites, and local flavors.
  • Departure from Penang
    Check out from your hotel, transfer to the airport, and board your flight to your onward destination.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!
