After a delightful breakfast, get ready for an enriching Half-Day Penang City Tour with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide leading the way. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a seamless and comfortable journey as you explore Penang’s cultural treasures. Visit the Reclining Buddha & Burmese Buddhist Temple, followed by a fascinating tour of the Penang History Museum + 3D experience (excluding entrance). Stroll through the UNESCO-listed Georgetown, passing by the \"Street of Racial Harmony,\" where diverse cultures blend beautifully. Witness the architectural marvels of St. George’s Anglican Church, Goddess of Mercy Temple, Sri Mariamman Temple, and Kapitan Keling Mosque. Capture unforgettable moments at Fort Cornwallis before indulging in Penang’s famous White Coffee & Tea. With Travelxploria’s top-tier services, every stop is an experience, making your Penang journey truly remarkable.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Transfer from Hotel to Penang Airport","day_summary":"

After a delightful stay in Penang, it's time to bid farewell. Our representative from Travelxploria, along with our best on-ground support staff, will ensure a smooth check-out from your hotel. You will then be comfortably transferred to the coach terminal, where our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will assist you in boarding your coach to Kuala Lumpur. Enjoy a relaxing journey as you take in the scenic views one last time. Upon arrival in Kuala Lumpur, our team will be there to facilitate your transfer to the International Airport, ensuring a seamless experience. With Travelxploria, your journey is not just about destinations but also about the care, comfort, and expertise that make every moment stress-free. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again for another unforgettable adventure.

Embark on an exciting Half-Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria, where our representative will ensure a seamless experience from start to finish. Accompanied by our experienced tour guide, dive into the city’s rich cultural heritage and stunning modern architecture. Enjoy photo stops at iconic landmarks such as the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque. Discover Malaysia’s sweet side with a visit to the Cocoa Centre, where you can learn about the country’s renowned chocolate industry. The tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, allowing you to soak in the vibrant atmosphere of Kuala Lumpur. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff ensuring smooth transitions and comfort throughout the tour, this experience will be both enriching and hassle-free.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

Embark on a thrilling Langkawi Mangrove & Cave Exploring Tour with Travelxploria for an adventure through nature’s wonders! Your journey begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up by our friendly representative. With our expert guide, set off on a scenic boat ride along the Kilim River, surrounded by lush mangroves and towering limestone formations. Witness exotic wildlife, from eagles soaring above to playful macaques along the riverbanks. Explore the mysterious Bat Cave, home to hundreds of resting bats, and be amazed by the stunning rock formations inside. Continue your adventure to the Crocodile Cave, where the river flows through a limestone tunnel, creating a breathtaking natural spectacle. Experience the famous floating fish farm, where you can interact with marine life. As the tour comes to an end, soak in the serenity of Langkawi’s untouched beauty before we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience.

packages.package_name: Magical Malaysia A Perfect Blend of Adventure, Nature, and Culture
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Langkawi
    Arrive in Langkawi, enjoy a scenic Langkawi Cable Car ride, and visit the Langkawi Wildlife Park.
  • Explore Langkawi's Attractions
    Relax at Pantai Cenang Beach, discover the Paradise 3D Museum, and admire Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls.
  • Journey to Kuala Lumpur and Malacca
    Fly to Kuala Lumpur, explore historical Malacca, and visit the iconic Petronas Twin Towers.
  • Discover Kuala Lumpur's Sights
    Visit the Kuala Lumpur Bird Park, Batu Caves, and the National Mosque of Malaysia.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur
    Check out from your hotel, transfer to the airport, and conclude your memorable trip.

As you arrive in the breathtaking island of Langkawi, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you at the airport, ensuring a smooth and comfortable transfer to your hotel. After checking in, let the adventure begin with an exhilarating ride on the Langkawi Cable Car, where you'll ascend 650 meters above sea level, taking in panoramic views of lush rainforests and the Andaman Sea. Our experienced tour guide will share fascinating insights about the island’s geology and culture, making the journey even more enriching. Next, we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, where you can get up close with over 150 species of birds and animals. With our best on-ground support staff ensuring a seamless experience, all you have to do is immerse yourself in the beauty of Langkawi’s nature and wildlife. Enjoy a stress-free day filled with wonder, perfectly curated by Travelxploria.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Pantai Cenang Beach - Paradise 3D Museum - Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls","day_summary":"

Escape to the stunning Cenang Beach with Travelxploria, where golden sands and turquoise waters create the perfect tropical retreat. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your beachside adventure. Guided by our expert travel companion, stroll along the palm-fringed shore, feeling the soft sand beneath your feet. Dive into thrilling water sports, from jet skiing to parasailing, or simply unwind with a cocktail while soaking in the breathtaking sunset. Explore lively beachfront cafes, indulge in local seafood delights, or shop for souvenirs at the nearby markets. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Cenang Beach offers the best of both worlds. As the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in fiery hues, we drop you back at your hotel, leaving you with memories of a truly magical seaside escape.

Step into a world of illusion and creativity with Travelxploria as we take you to 3D Art in Paradise Langkawi, the largest 3D art museum in Malaysia! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle for a hassle-free journey. With our expert guide, explore interactive and mind-bending artworks across multiple themed zones, from underwater worlds to fantasy landscapes. Pose with realistic optical illusions, where you become part of the art in stunning, Instagram-worthy scenes. Experience immersive storytelling through 3D paintings that bring your imagination to life. Our guide will help you find the best photo spots to create unforgettable memories. Whether walking on a rickety bridge or diving into an ocean, every corner offers a new surprise. After a fun-filled adventure in this interactive museum, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience in Langkawi!

Immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls, one of Langkawi’s most breathtaking attractions, with Travelxploria. Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, journey to this stunning \"Seven Wells Waterfall,\" named after its seven natural pools. Hike through lush rainforest trails, encountering exotic flora and fauna along the way. Feel the refreshing mist as cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. Take a dip in the cool pools, slide down natural rock formations, or simply relax amidst nature’s serenity. For thrill-seekers, a short climb rewards you with panoramic views of Langkawi’s landscape. Capture stunning photos of this magical haven before we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience. Whether for adventure or relaxation, Telaga Tujuh promises an unforgettable encounter with Langkawi’s natural wonders.

Immerse yourself in the natural beauty of Telaga Tujuh Waterfalls, one of Langkawi’s most breathtaking attractions, with Travelxploria. Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, journey to this stunning \"Seven Wells Waterfall,\" named after its seven natural pools. Hike through lush rainforest trails, encountering exotic flora and fauna along the way. Feel the refreshing mist as cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. Take a dip in the cool pools, slide down natural rock formations, or simply relax amidst nature’s serenity. For thrill-seekers, a short climb rewards you with panoramic views of Langkawi’s landscape. Capture stunning photos of this magical haven before we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable experience. Whether for adventure or relaxation, Telaga Tujuh promises an unforgettable encounter with Langkawi’s natural wonders!​

Bid farewell to Langkawi as our Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth transfer to the airport for your flight to Kuala Lumpur. Upon arrival, our experienced tour guide will greet you and take you on a fascinating journey to Malacca, a UNESCO World Heritage Site brimming with colonial charm, historic forts, and vibrant culture. Wander through Dutch Square, St. Paul’s Hill, and Jonker Street, soaking in the rich heritage and indulging in local delights. With our best on-ground support staff taking care of every detail, your journey remains seamless and stress-free. As the day winds down, prepare to be amazed by the Petronas Twin Towers, standing tall as Malaysia’s most iconic landmark. Gaze at the city lights from the sky bridge, capturing unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every step of your journey is effortlessly curated, ensuring comfort, exploration, and awe-inspiring experiences.

Begin your avian adventure as Travelxploria’s friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at KL Bird Park, our expert guide will lead you through the world’s largest free-flight aviary, where thousands of exotic birds roam in lush, natural habitats. Marvel at colorful macaws, majestic hornbills, and playful flamingos as they soar freely around you. Enjoy interactive feeding sessions, witness captivating bird shows, and capture stunning photographs amidst the lush greenery. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse bird species and conservation efforts at the park’s educational exhibits. Whether you’re a nature lover or a photography enthusiast, this experience promises unforgettable moments. After an enchanting day surrounded by chirping melodies and fluttering wings, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and delightful journey with Travelxploria!

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

Begin your spiritual and cultural journey as Travelxploria’s representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Upon arrival at the National Mosque of Malaysia (Masjid Negara), our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into its stunning architecture, rich Islamic heritage, and deep cultural significance. Admire the mosque’s grand 73-meter-high minaret, striking blue-tiled dome, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Step inside the vast prayer hall, where intricate Islamic calligraphy and elegant design create a serene ambiance. Learn about Malaysia’s diverse Islamic influences and the mosque’s role in the nation’s spiritual life. Stroll through the reflecting pools and fountains, capturing breathtaking photos of this iconic landmark. Whether seeking cultural enrichment or peaceful reflection, this visit promises an unforgettable experience. After exploring, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and enriching journey with Travelxploria.​

packages.overview:
• Arrival & Iconic Landmarks – Explore the majestic Petronas Twin Towers and the lush KL Bird Park.
  • Tea & Tranquility in Cameron Highlands – Visit Boh Tea Plantation and the vibrant Cameron Lavender Garden.
  • Butterflies & History – Discover the Butterfly Farm and Time Tunnel Museum in the cool Cameron Highlands.
  • Island Escape & Jungle Trek – Experience Pangkor Laut Island’s lush rainforests and scenic trekking trails.
  • Thrilling Water Adventures & Sunset Views – Enjoy water sports, a breathtaking sunset, and a seafood feast at Fisherman’s Cove.
  • Beach Bliss & Cultural Vibes – Relax at Coral Beach before diving into Chinatown’s bustling energy.
  • Farewell Malaysia – Check out and transfer to the airport, bidding goodbye to an unforgettable journey.

your journey, embark on a scenic escape to the cool, tranquil hills of Cameron Highlands, accompanied by a representative from Travelxploria. Begin your adventure at the renowned Boh Tea Plantation, where you’ll enjoy a guided tour through lush green hills, learning about the tea-making process and savoring a cup of freshly brewed tea. Your expert Travelxploria guide will share the rich history behind this iconic plantation, making your experience both informative and delightful. Next, wander through the Cameron Lavender Garden, where vibrant flowers and aromatic scents create a peaceful oasis. ","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Coral Beach - Chinatown","day_summary":"

Visit Coral Beach for a relaxing day of sunbathing and swimming in its turquoise waters. Immerse yourself in the vibrant sights and sounds of Chinatown Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria! Your journey begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore the bustling Petaling Street, where colorful market stalls offer everything from trendy fashion and antiques to souvenirs and mouth-watering street food. Wander through the charming alleyways and discover hidden cultural gems like the Guan Di Temple and Sin Sze Si Ya Temple, where ancient traditions and spirituality come to life. Indulge in delicious local treats such as char kway teow, satay, and refreshing air mata kucing, experiencing the authentic flavors of Kuala Lumpur. Capture stunning photos, shop for unique finds, and soak in the lively ambiance of this iconic district. After an unforgettable cultural exploration, sit back and relax as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless travel experience.

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

Apart from these two things we enjoyed the entire trip. Thanks a lot to Mr. Sanjib for making our trip so smooth n happening. Thanks to TravelXploria entire team for their cooperation. Looking forward for more ...

overview:
Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

​

Travelxploria brings you the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata, carefully designed for families, honeymoon couples, and leisure travelers looking for a smooth and value packed international holiday. From iconic cityscapes to serene islands, our Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata deliver the perfect balance of sightseeing, relaxation, and cultural discovery.

Why Choose Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Malaysia is one of the most convenient international destinations for travelers from Kolkata. With strong air connectivity via major hubs, reaching Malaysia is easy and time efficient. Indian passport holders can opt for eVisa or visa on arrival options, and Travelxploria provides complete visa assistance to ensure a stress free travel experience. This makes Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata both affordable and hassle free.

Malaysia stands out for its diversity. In one trip, travelers experience modern cities, tropical beaches, misty highlands, and historic towns. From shopping and food trails to nature escapes and cultural landmarks, a Malaysia tour package from Kolkata offers something for every type of traveler.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Group Travelers

Malaysia is extremely family friendly with safe cities, excellent infrastructure, and attractions suitable for all age groups. Honeymooners enjoy beach resorts, sunset cruises, and romantic city stays, while groups appreciate flexible itineraries and value driven planning. Travelxploria customizes Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata for families, couples, and groups with personalized itineraries and reliable on ground support.

Top Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

The most popular option is the 5 to 7 days Malaysia tour package from Kolkata, covering the country’s top highlights. This itinerary typically includes Kuala Lumpur, Langkawi, and Penang. Travelers enjoy city tours, island relaxation, cultural walks, and scenic viewpoints, all without rushing the journey.

For couples, Malaysia honeymoon packages from Kolkata focus on romantic experiences such as beachside stays in Langkawi, sunset cruises, and luxury hotels in Kuala Lumpur. Budget friendly Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata are ideal for value conscious travelers, offering comfortable hotels and must see attractions at competitive prices. Families and groups can choose customized Malaysia itineraries with private transfers, kid friendly activities, and flexible sightseeing.

Must Visit Places Included in Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Kuala Lumpur offers a mix of modern attractions and cultural landmarks. The Malaysia Kuala Lumpur city tour includes the iconic Petronas Twin Towers, shopping districts, and the spiritual Batu Caves. Langkawi is perfect for beach lovers, known for island hopping, cable car rides, and relaxed coastal vibes. Penang attracts culture and food enthusiasts with colonial architecture, street art, and famous local cuisine. Cameron Highlands provides a refreshing escape with tea plantations and cool weather, while Malacca adds depth with its UNESCO listed heritage streets and night markets.

What Is Included in the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Most Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata include return flights, airport transfers, hotel accommodation with daily breakfast, guided sightseeing tours, local transportation, visa assistance, and travel insurance. Honeymoon and family packages may also include special experiences such as cable car tickets, island tours, or private transfers.

Best Time to Visit Malaysia From Kolkata

December to February is ideal for visiting the west coast and cities like Kuala Lumpur and Langkawi, offering pleasant weather for sightseeing and beaches. March to October works well for highlands and cultural destinations, with fewer crowds and good travel deals. Travelers planning during shoulder or off seasons can often secure better prices on Malaysia tour packages from Kolkata.

How to Book the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers transparent pricing, expert travel guidance, and dependable customer support for booking Malaysia holidays from Kolkata. Booking early, choosing flexible travel dates, and traveling during non peak periods help secure the best deals. Ensure your passport has at least six months validity and keep essential documents ready before departure.

Choosing the Best Malaysia Tour Packages From Kolkata means choosing a journey filled with culture, comfort, and memorable experiences. With Travelxploria, your Malaysia trip is planned with care, value, and complete peace of mind.
